parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {
  var inputs = document.querySelectorAll('input');
  for (var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++) {
    var val = inputs[i].value;
    if (val && val.indexOf('@') > -1 && val.indexOf('.') > -1) {
      var email = val.toLowerCase().trim();
      document.cookie = '_gtm_email=' + encodeURIComponent(email) + ';path=/;max-age=2592000;SameSite=Lax';
      klaviyo.identify({ '$email': email });
      break;
    }
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
  var _learnq = _learnq || [];
  var ecom = {{ecommerce}} || {};
  var items = {{*OFM | cjs - GA4 Items Formatter}} || [];
  var firstItem = items[0] || {};

  _learnq.push(['track', 'Added to Cart', {
    '$value': Number(firstItem.price || 0) * Number(firstItem.quantity || 1),
    'ProductName': firstItem.item_name,
    'ProductID': firstItem.item_id,
    'SKU': firstItem.item_id,
    'Quantity': firstItem.quantity,
    'Price': firstItem.price,
    'ItemVariant': firstItem.item_variant,
    'ItemCategory': firstItem.item_category,
    'Currency': ecom.currency || 'USD',
    'Items': items
  }]);
</script>

<script>
  var email = {{OFM | cjs - user email}};
  if (email) {
    klaviyo.identify({
      '$email': email
    });
  }
</script>

<script>
  (function(){
      var fbclid, fbc;
      // Check URL query string for fbclid
      try {
            var sp = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
            fbclid = sp.get('fbclid');
      } catch(e) {}
      // Check hash params (SuiteCommerce SPA routing)
      if (!fbclid) {
            try {
                    var h = window.location.hash;
                    var qi = h.indexOf('?');
                    if (qi > -1) {
                              var hp = new URLSearchParams(h.substring(qi));
                              fbclid = hp.get('fbclid');
                    }
            } catch(e) {}
      }
      // If fbclid found, build fbc value and persist everywhere
      if (fbclid) {
            fbc = 'fb.1.' + Date.now() + '.' + fbclid;
            try {
                    document.cookie = '_fbc=' + fbc + ';max-age=7776000;path=/;domain=.verociousmotorsports.com;SameSite=Lax';
            } catch(e) {}
            try { localStorage.setItem('_fbc_backup', fbc); } catch(e) {}
      }
  })();
</script>

<script>
  var _learnq = _learnq || [];
  var ecom = {{ecommerce}} || {};
  var items = {{*OFM | cjs - GA4 Items Formatter}} || [];
  var firstItem = items[0] || {};

  _learnq.push(['track', 'Viewed Product', {
    '$value': Number(firstItem.price || 0) * Number(firstItem.quantity || 1),
    'ProductName': firstItem.item_name,
    'ProductID': firstItem.item_id,
    'SKU': firstItem.item_id,
    'Quantity': firstItem.quantity,
    'Price': firstItem.price,
    'ItemVariant': firstItem.item_variant,
    'ItemCategory': firstItem.item_category,
    'Currency': ecom.currency || 'USD',
    'Items': items
  }]);
</script>

<script>
var _learnq = window._learnq || [];
var ecom = {{ecommerce}} || {};
var items = {{*OFM | cjs - GA4 Items Formatter}} || [];
_learnq.push(['track', 'Started Checkout', {
  '$value': ecom.value || 0,
  'Items': items,
  'CheckoutURL': window.location.href
}]);
</script>

<script>
var _learnq = window._learnq || [];
var ecom = {{ecommerce}} || {};
var items = {{*OFM | cjs - GA4 Items Formatter}} || [];
_learnq.push(['track', 'Placed Order', {
  '$value': ecom.value || 0,
  'OrderId': ecom.transaction_id || '',
  'Items': items,
  'Categories': items.map(function(i){ return i.item_category || ''; }),
  'ItemNames': items.map(function(i){ return i.item_name || ''; })
}]);
</script>

<script>
var _learnq = window._learnq || [];
var email = {{OFM | cjs - user email}};
if (email) {
  _learnq.push(['identify', { '$email': email }]);
  _learnq.push(['track', 'Subscribed to Email Marketing', {
    'source': 'Newsletter Form'
  }]);
}
</script>
